title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
